info.title: Prontiq API
info.description: Unified API for Australian and global open data products.

schema.description: Maximum number of suggestions to return.

parameters.description: Maximum number of suggestions to return.
parameters.name: limit

state.description: Australian state code (NSW, VIC, QLD, SA, WA, TAS, NT, ACT).

reliability.description: G-NAF geocode reliability (0-6, lower is better).

category.description: Land use category, e.g. Residential, Commercial.

match.description: Best matching address, or null if no match.

confidence.description: Match confidence: high (score > 20), medium (10-20), low (< 10), or none (no match).

state.description: Australian state code (NSW, VIC, QLD, SA, WA, TAS, NT, ACT).

reliability.description: G-NAF geocode reliability (0-6, lower is better).

category.description: Land use category, e.g. Residential, Commercial.

schema.description: Maximum number of nearby addresses to return.

parameters.description: Maximum number of nearby addresses to return.
parameters.name: limit

state.description: Australian state code (NSW, VIC, QLD, SA, WA, TAS, NT, ACT).

reliability.description: G-NAF geocode reliability (0-6, lower is better).

category.description: Land use category, e.g. Residential, Commercial.

distance_m.description: Distance from query point in meters.

address_count.description: Number of addresses in this locality.

bounds.description: Geographic bounding box of the suburb.
